SUNAT 2026-04-15 · 7 min

SIRE 2026: a practical guide for Peruvian SMBs

DA
DGD Accounting Consultant
Senior accountant · Grupo DGD
On this page
What is SIREWho is requiredCritical stepsMistakes to avoidConclusion
Share

The Integrated Electronic Records System is no longer optional. We explain what changed in 2026, who's required and how to prepare without surprises.

At Grupo DGD we support Peruvian SMBs trying to tidy their tax and accounting operations with the Codeplex suite. Some patterns repeat — and concrete lessons worth sharing emerge.

This article aims to be practical: no abstract theory, just clear steps you can apply this week at your company.

Who is required

SUNAT regulation has moved fast in the last two years. What was optional is now mandatory, and compliance windows keep shrinking.

SMBs that move early avoid fines and — above all — operational headaches.

«80% of SUNAT problems aren't technical: they're poorly designed internal processes.»

Critical steps

In our experience, an orderly implementation follows this order:

  1. Initial diagnosis — inventory of processes, data sources and SUNAT accesses.
  2. Master cleanup — chart of accounts, customer and supplier master cleaned up.
  3. Pilot migration — a full test period before official go-live.
  4. Live training — your team needs to see the system running on your data.
  5. Go-live and support — the first 30 days are key to closing well.

Mistakes to avoid

The most common stumbles we see month after month:

#1 Changing everything the same day without a pilot
#2 Not involving the accountant from the start
#3 Skipping formal training
#4 Leaving migration to the end of the process

Conclusion

Digitizing is not a technology project; it's a process project with a tool underneath. Once you see it that way, decisions fall into place.

If you have doubts about where to start, book a free call — we talk concretely about your case, no sales script.

Want to go deeper on this topic?

Book 30 minutes with a DGD consultant — we review your specific case together.
